meaning: n.糖蜜,甜蜜,过分甜蜜的声调
examples: Where did they draw the treacle from?
Put a bit o' treacle on it or a bit o' sugar.
"They lived on treacle," said the Dormouse, after thinking a minute or two.
Instead, with no real deadline, a long, slow, thickening of the treacle looks a likelier outcome.
Anyway, the day after I got the diagnosis, I was back at work, hauling treacle.
